calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Mary Gemma O'Keeffe appearing via zoom for Vilma Soares.

The Court finds that the Probate Code 6124 presumption is revoked. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated April 05, 1985 is admitted to probate. Vilma Soares is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Shirley Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Continued To May-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
